hypotheses.title: Aggregate Modulus H_a from Confined Compression Predicts Debridement Better Than G'/G''
hypotheses.key_reason: Foundational measurement hypothesis with strong theoretical backing, genuine novelty, specific falsifiable predictions

hypotheses.title: FCD of Alginate Biofilm Predicts Donnan-Mediated Cationic Antibiotic Partitioning
hypotheses.key_reason: Novel FCD measurement + quantitative Donnan framework. Limited at physiological ionic strength but valuable for airway contexts.

hypotheses.title: Net FCD Transitions During Maturation with Ionic Sensitivity Reversal
hypotheses.key_reason: Thermodynamically sound FCD transition prediction. Therapeutic window claim speculative. Conditional on demonstrating transition in vitro.

hypotheses.title: Streaming Potential Reveals Spatial FCD Heterogeneity
hypotheses.key_reason: Novel technique transfer. Conditional on demonstrating detectable signal in simplest case (alginate-only biofilm).

hypotheses.title: Pel vs Alginate Differential Swelling via Ca2+
hypotheses.key_reason: Sign error in Donnan mechanism. Novelty insufficient — Ca2+-alginate binding already well-studied.

hypotheses.title: Creep Time Constant Predicts Convective Penetration Timescale
hypotheses.key_reason: Not independently testable. 4-order parameter uncertainty. Loading mode mismatch.
